steps: File formal tax reclaim with Citigroup Australia for AUD 138,750 excess withholding on BHP dividend, citing AU-NO treaty 15% rate vs 25% applied
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate and AU-NO treaty entitlement documentation to support 15% withholding rate claim
Request Citigroup provide Australian Tax Office Form for foreign resident dividend withholding adjustment
Escalate to Citigroup's tax reclaim department with calculation showing 25% applied vs 15% treaty rate on AUD 1,387,500 gross

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
